name: Beer Basted Hibachi Chicken w/ Fresh Herbs & Magic
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the chicken.
2. Mix together garlic, salt, white pepper, cayenne pepper, paprika, coriander, basil, thyme, marjoram, and black pepper in a bowl.
3. Rub the seasoning mixture thoroughly over the inside and outside of the chicken.
4. Place fresh herbs into the cavity of the chicken.
5. Brush the chicken with olive oil.
6. Transfer the chicken to an oven-proof dish.
7. Pour beer over the chicken until it is completely covered.
8. Cook on a charcoal grill, covered, for 1 hour and 30 minutes, basting every 20 minutes with the beer.
